reviews.review_description: This app is such a cool way to explore the Church of San Paolo in Ferrara. It takes you inside this beautiful, historic place — but the real magic is in the hidden frescoes. These are paintings that were covered up for centuries, tucked away behind walls and forgotten with time. Now, through VR, you can actually see them in incredible detail. You feel like you’re standing right there, seeing every brushstroke and faded color like it was just painted. It’s like stepping into a secret part of history. Even if you’re not a big art person, it’s just super fun and fascinating.

reviews.review_title: A unique journey into history of art!
reviews.review_description: An absolutely extraordinary VR experience! I explored beautiful frescoes hidden for centuries, discovering incredible details that I could never have seen with my own eyes. Perfect for anyone passionate about art and history!
